---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement for the Vue.js frontend
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What limitation does it address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information about the feature request:
- UI mockups or screenshots (if applicable)
- Examples of this feature in other applications
- Implementation considerations
